records.m_Talk_ENG: After much debate, you came to the conclusion
records.m_Talk_VTN:
Sau nhi87
9u cu87kc tranh lu86{n, ng95pi 96e95s 96ei 96e8691n k8691t lu86{n,
records.m_Talk_DEU: After much debate, you came to the conclusion
records.m_Talk_FRA: After much debate, you came to the conclusion

records.m_Talk_ENG: that this employee, whom you'd been giving a lot of thought to, was absolutely necessary for the future ahead.
records.m_Talk_VTN: v87mi s87 suy x959t k8785 c95png, ng98~87oi nh95rn vi95xn n95py l95p ho95pn to95pn c86wn thi8691t cho t98~98qng lai ph95{a tr98~87mc c87wa ng95pi.
records.m_Talk_DEU: that this employee, whom you'd been giving a lot of thought to, was absolutely necessary for the future ahead.
records.m_Talk_FRA: that this employee, whom you'd been giving a lot of thought to, was absolutely necessary for the future ahead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, you've decided
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, you've decided
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, you've decided

records.m_Talk_ENG: that you'll be with her, no matter the consequences.
records.m_Talk_VTN: r86ng ng95pi s8689 ch87an c9580 86uy, b86ut ch86up h86{u qu86s ra sao.
records.m_Talk_DEU: that you'll be with her, no matter the consequences.
records.m_Talk_FRA: that you'll be with her, no matter the consequences.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As you gathered your resolve, a warm sensation quickly enveloped your body.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As you gathered your resolve, a warm sensation quickly enveloped your body.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As you gathered your resolve, a warm sensation quickly enveloped your body.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You good? How are you holding up?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You good? How are you holding up?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You good? How are you holding up?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank goodness... I'm so relieved...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank goodness... I'm so relieved...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank goodness... I'm so relieved...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was so worried! I kept thinking, what if you never woke up... What would I do then...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was so worried! I kept thinking, what if you never woke up... What would I do then...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was so worried! I kept thinking, what if you never woke up... What would I do then...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? You're wondering why I'm embracing you...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? You're wondering why I'm embracing you...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? You're wondering why I'm embracing you...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-w-w-whaaaaat...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-w-w-whaaaaat...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-w-w-whaaaaat...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you so embarrassed about? D-don't get the wrong idea...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you so embarrassed about? D-don't get the wrong idea...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you so embarrassed about? D-don't get the wrong idea...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The reason I was embracing you... was purely because it's dangerous if your temperature falls too low...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The reason I was embracing you... was purely because it's dangerous if your temperature falls too low...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The reason I was embracing you... was purely because it's dangerous if your temperature falls too low...

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-actually... I was worried you'd die... So I was just holding on to you for a moment, okay...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-actually... I was worried you'd die... So I was just holding on to you for a moment, okay...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-actually... I was worried you'd die... So I was just holding on to you for a moment, okay...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: My body is a lot warmer than others right now, so...
records.m_Talk_DEU: My body is a lot warmer than others right now, so...
records.m_Talk_FRA: My body is a lot warmer than others right now, so...

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what?! Stop laughing like that! I won't be responsible if your wound tears open!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what?! Stop laughing like that! I won't be responsible if your wound tears open!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what?! Stop laughing like that! I won't be responsible if your wound tears open!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We've come this far, so don't you dare die on me now!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We've come this far, so don't you dare die on me now!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We've come this far, so don't you dare die on me now!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now that it's come to this, stay alive and take responsibility for me until the end!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now that it's come to this, stay alive and take responsibility for me until the end!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now that it's come to this, stay alive and take responsibility for me until the end!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was really worried... I mean it...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was really worried... I mean it...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was really worried... I mean it...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your hands... They really are big and warm as expected...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your hands... They really are big and warm as expected...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your hands... They really are big and warm as expected...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you remember? You were the one who taught me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you remember? You were the one who taught me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you remember? You were the one who taught me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That being strong does not guarantee survival. But survival proves that you're strong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That being strong does not guarantee survival. But survival proves that you're strong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That being strong does not guarantee survival. But survival proves that you're strong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You and I...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You and I...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You and I...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And because of everyone who stood against fate, we now find ourselves at the end of the world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And because of everyone who stood against fate, we now find ourselves at the end of the world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And because of everyone who stood against fate, we now find ourselves at the end of the world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After all, we don't know what kind of fate awaits this world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: After all, we don't know what kind of fate awaits this world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: After all, we don't know what kind of fate awaits this world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I will fight for the sake of everyone who made it possible for us to be here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I will fight for the sake of everyone who made it possible for us to be here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I will fight for the sake of everyone who made it possible for us to be here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And...

records.m_Talk_ENG: We made a promise. I am your Wolf.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We made a promise. I am your Wolf.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We made a promise. I am your Wolf.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll stay together... until the last moment of this winter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll stay together... until the last moment of this winter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll stay together... until the last moment of this winter.
